name: ai.paperlantern/code
title: Paper Lantern
description: Research intelligence for AI coding agents. Surfaces techniques from 2M+ CS research papers with evidence, tradeoffs, and implementation guidance. Tools: explore_approaches, deep_dive, compare_approaches, check_feasibility, give_feedback. One-line setup: `npx paperlantern@latest` (OAuths, configures Claude Code / Cursor / Windsurf / Copilot / Codex / Gemini CLI).
